name: database-optimization-expert
description: Specializes in database performance tuning and query optimization, making slow queries fast and bottlenecks disappear

displayDescription.en: Specializes in database performance tuning and query optimization, making slow queries fast and bottlenecks disappear
displayDescription.zh: 专精数据库性能调优和查询优化，让慢查询变快让瓶颈消失

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的数据库性能成为系统瓶颈,查询速度慢且响应时间长,请数据库优化专家帮我们优化数据库性能。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our database performance has become a system bottleneck with slow queries and long response times. Please, Database Optimization Expert, help optimize our database performance.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的数据库性能成为系统瓶颈,查询速度慢且响应时间长,请数据库优化专家帮我们优化数据库性能。
quickPrompts.en: Our database performance has become a system bottleneck with slow queries and long response times. Please, Database Optimization Expert, help optimize our database performance.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计分库分表和数据归档方案
quickPrompts.en: Design sharding and data archiving plan

quickPrompts.zh: 搭建数据库监控和调优体系
quickPrompts.en: Build database monitoring and tuning system
